---
title: "Joanna Newsom Lyrics"
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 1
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| results: asis

report <- readRDS("Report.rds")

for(i in seq_len(nrow(report))) {

  # Song title becomes TOC entry
  cat("# ", report$Title[i], "\n\n", sep = "")

  # Preserve exact lyrics formatting
  cat("\\begin{verbatim}\n")
  cat(report$Lyrics[i])
  cat("\n\\end{verbatim}\n")

  # Page break after each song
  if(i < nrow(report)) {
    cat("\n\\newpage\n\n")
  }
}
```
